title: Pets Natural
description: Adds natural spawns for the custom mobs featured in PetsMod, as well as spawn eggs and drops.
body:
# Pets Natural

Pets Natural adds all of the custom mobs featured in [PetsMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pets-mod). If you are not aware of this mod, it adds client-sided pets to your game in order to have a companion when playing, of any type - and some custom mobs were bundled in as well. These custom mobs include:

## Penguin

![The Penguin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10123888f0551161cc7beaaa53b963add3beeb9b_0.webp)

- Spawns in snowy biomes
- Breeable with fish

## Racoon

![The Racoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05f4b0c8fc12044271433118bc743f745f7064a_0.webp)

- Spawns inside of and near villages
- Breedable with seeds and berries

## Duck

![The Duck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49857a08caae7f724d20c94448a8e20a9fb0d2b4_0.webp)

- Spawns in grassy areas and around water
- Breedable with fish
- Comes in two variants, the pekin and the mallard
- Drops feathers

## Dumbo Octopi

![Dumbo Octopi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7fb36f2186e5c0d0c1a97b756fafe71add64f18_0.webp)

- Spawns in rivers and oceans
- Spawns in groups of 2 to 4
- Comes in six different colors

## Stingray

- Spawns alone in rivers and oceans

![Stingray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da73d0767d36d6b3a133a85f05927c7d4f9f388a_0.webp)

## Koi Fish

![Koi Fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d19c4aa9ddd599b39e87aa8be06620b68bf15cf_0.webp)

- Spawns in groups of two to four in rivers and oceans\
- Comes with their own structure, the koi pond

![Koi Pond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f957a9905f8ff730f976001134cd50a599c2be9f_0.webp)

And more to come soon. This mod will be updated alongside PetsMod, meaning if a new Mob Pack is released, this will be updated to include those new mobs.

## Requirements

This mod requires [PetsMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pets-mod). If you do not wish to use the features in this mod, please use /pet off once you have launched Minecraft.
